prerequisites: A Short.io account with at least one domain connected (the domain whose links and statistics you want to extract).
The numeric Short.io domain ID (domain_id) of that domain, which Short.io returns as the DomainId field on domain and link objects.
A Short.io secret API key created under Integrations & API in the dashboard.
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest point from which to begin extracting data.

authMethods.name: Secret API key (Authorization header)
authMethods.summary: Short.io authenticates API requests with a single secret API key passed in the HTTP Authorization header. This maps to the connector's secret_key field. Create the key in the Short.io dashboard under Integrations & API by clicking Create API Key and giving it a description; copy it immediately, because Short.io does not let you retrieve the key again after you leave the page.

setupSteps.title: Create a Short.io secret API key
setupSteps.body: In the Short.io dashboard, open the menu and select Integrations & API. Under the Short.io API section, click Create API Key, enter a Key Description, and click Create. Copy the generated key right away. Short.io warns that you cannot retrieve the key again once you navigate away from the page. Provide this value as the secret_key field.

setupSteps.title: Identify the domain ID
setupSteps.body: Set domain_id to the numeric ID of the Short.io domain you want to extract. Short.io exposes this identifier as the DomainId field returned on domain and link objects from its API (for example via the GET /api/domains endpoint, which lists all domains for the authenticated user).

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide start_date as the earliest date from which data should be extracted. Records older than this date are excluded, and the value anchors incremental syncs.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and run
setupSteps.body: Supply secret_key, domain_id, and start_date. The connector sends the secret_key in the Authorization header on each request to the Short.io API and pulls data for the configured domain from start_date onward.

sources.title: Short.io API Reference: GET /api/domains (lists domains for the authenticated user)
Short.io Docs: Creating your first short link (secret API key in Authorization header, domain required, DomainId returned)
Short.io Blog: How to test API requests via Short.io's API Reference portal (creating an API key under Integrations & API, Authorization header)
